input.background: Exercise 13.1 presented data on birth weights of infants based on the smoking status of mothers. Table 13.3 lists the data. Descriptive statistics are shown in Table 13.10.
input.question: Conduct an ANOVA on these data. Show all hypothesis-testing steps. Step 2: Compute the test statistic.

output.answer:
Test statistic. ANOVA table (below), $F_{\text {stat }}=4.096 / 1.255=3.26$ with 3 and 21 df.

\begin{tabular}{lcrc}
\hline & Sum of Squares & $d f$ & Mean Square \
Between Groups & 12.289 & 3 & 4.096 \
Within Groups & 26.364 & 21 & 1.255 \
Total & 38.653 & 24 & \\ \hline
\end{tabular}
